preferences.label: No CPR if NYHA IV without reversible cause
preferences.original_text: If my heart stops and I am in NYHA Class IV with no reversible cause, do not attempt CPR.

preferences.label: Accept temporary ventilation if reversible cause
preferences.original_text: I would accept temporary intubation if there is a reversible cause, but not indefinite ventilation.

preferences.label: No indefinite ventilation
preferences.original_text: I would accept temporary intubation if there is a reversible cause, but not indefinite ventilation.

preferences.label: Deactivate ICD if enrolled in hospice
preferences.original_text: Deactivate my ICD if I am enrolled in hospice.

preferences.label: No chronic dialysis
preferences.original_text: I do not want to be placed on long-term maintenance dialysis.

preferences.label: Accept acute dialysis if recoverable
preferences.original_text: I would accept short-term dialysis if my kidney function is expected to recover.

preferences.label: Escalate inotropes only if LVAD or transplant planned
preferences.original_text: Escalate inotropes only if there is a plan for LVAD or transplant evaluation.

preferences.label: Withdraw vasopressors if no improvement after 72 hours
preferences.original_text: If I am on vasopressors with no improvement after 3 days, withdraw them.

preferences.label: Vague: no aggressive measures
preferences.original_text: If I am dying, I do not want aggressive measures or to be kept alive by machines.
